business_ideas.idea: Run the World: digital conference platform during coronavirus.
Book clubs for niche audiences (romance novels most profitable).
Buy and revitalize legacy book properties (Book of the Month Club).
Notion template marketplace and app store for power users.
Agora model: lead gen funnels ($5 book -> $2k newsletter backend).
Just Talking: companionship-as-service for 50+ year-olds online.
Papa: grandkids-as-a-service for elderly care and companionship.
Honor: on-demand caretaker platform for home healthcare.
Relationship Hero: online dating coaching for older singles.
Open Door: house flipping at scale using data-driven models.
Made Renovation: turnkey bathroom renovation ($5k, four designs).

predictions.text: Stripe could become $100B+ company; already $20B+ valuation now.

Sports betting stocks will outperform as legislation opens up.
Browser replacements (Brave, etc) could be multi-billion exit.
Stock market outperformance via FANG 5 beats venture capital returns.
